title: CloudMons 【Cobblemon】
description: A pack made for some Pokemon without a model
body:
# A pack made for some Pokemon without a model
1. Add Wattrel Line Model
2. Add Vullaby Line Model
3. Add Nymble Line Model
4. Add Great Tusk Model
5. Add Brute Bonnet Model
## More Pokemon will be updated in the future!
